title.en: The Divine General of the Rising Dragon asked i...

content.en:
"You killed the Earth Venerables of my Xulong Holy Land?"

The Divine General of the Rising Dragon asked in a cold voice.

"Yes, so what?"

Ye Tian stood up, stared at the Xulong Divine General, and chuckled.

"Then go die!"

The Xulong Divine General made a move, turned into a light dragon with one shot, and rushed towards Ye Tian, that Brilliant Heavenly Might was enough to make any ten-star Earth Venerable despair, this was a full-strength blow that belonged to the mid-stage one-star Divine General.

This move is also his trick - Xulong marksmanship!

Not far away, the First Divine Lord and the others trembled, as if time and space had been frozen, and there was no way to dodge it.

If this blow of the Rising Dragon God kills, they will all die.

"If you don't do it, you might live. But if you make a move, then a god general will fall today!"

Ye Tian's voice filled the void and said.

The next moment.

Ye Tian grabbed the Xulong spear that the Xulong Marksmanship turned into with one hand, of course he didn't simply use his body to shake this move, but performed the Great Immortal Technique, coupled with his terrifying body, how terrifying the power he exerted.

Boom!!

The Xulong spear that the Xulong Marksmanship turned into collapsed, but Ye Tian's hand was unharmed, as if it was just being irradiated by the sun.

"What!"

The dragon god will be shocked.

This is his trick, he already attaches enough importance to Ye Tian, and even regards Ye Tian as a mid-star god general, which is high enough.

But now, his trick was captured and destroyed by Ye Tian with one hand, what a huge gap.

"Run!"

The dragon god will be very simple, and he wants to escape when he sees that the situation is not good.

He felt that Ye Tian's strength was estimated to be far superior to him, otherwise he would not have destroyed his trick so easily.

Such a terrifying existence, where would he dare to provoke.

Those earth lords of the Xulong Holy Land will die if they die, and there is no shortage of earth honors in the Cangyu universe, and they will develop again, but if he dies, the Xulong Holy Land will really perish.

Seeing that the Xulong God General was going to use a retreat technique to escape, Ye Tian said lightly: "I said that a God General will fall today!"

I saw Ye Tian take out his saber and quickly slash at the position of the Xulong God General.

"Sky Slash!"

Wow!

The position of the Rising Dragon God was instantly slashed by a single sword, and the Rapid Dragon Divine froze the flying body, and then the entire body was divided into two parts.

It stands to reason that if such an existence is cut in two, it is not a serious injury, as long as the soul is not destroyed and the vitality of the body is not completely annihilated, then it can live.

But the vitality of the Xulong Divine General was completely annihilated under this sword, and his soul was also shattered.

With a sword, a god will fall!

And this scene happened to be seen by the Lord of the Yuan Gu who had just arrived.

"The Divine Dragon is going to die, and he was killed by the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws!!!

The eyes of the Lord of the Yuan Gu shrank sharply.

He is not the opponent of the Xulong Divine General, so if Ye Tian wants to kill him, it is a matter of a knife?

"Lord of the Yuangu, you're here!"

Ye Tian's voice came into his ears.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu trembled, and hurriedly shuttled to Ye Tian's side, and said politely: "I've seen ten thousand laws...... God will!"

In the past, Ye Tian could be called the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws, but now this title is not good, Ye Tian is already a god general-level combat power, according to the title in chaos, he can be called a certain god general, even if he is not called a god general, he cannot use the supreme to call the other party.

"The Lord of the Yuan Gu is polite!"

Ye Tiandao.

At this time, the First Divine Lord and others also came over and thanked them: "Thank you to the Ten Thousand Law Gods for protecting the Divine Clan!"

"Don't worry, within a hundred years, I will protect the Protoss. However, now that the Swift Dragon God General has fallen, the Swift Dragon Holy Land is not a cause for concern. Presumably, there will be no danger to the Protoss in the future. But after this time, I don't owe the Protoss, and the Protoss will have to rely on the Protoss themselves in the future!" Ye Tiandao.

"Understood!"

The First Divine Lord nodded.

The Lord of the Yuan Gu didn't stay here long, and soon left.

And the news of the death of the Xulong God not only spread in the Eternal Universe, but also spread to the Cangyu Universe.

All of a sudden, the two universes were shaken.

This is the first god-level powerhouse to fall in the era of the dual universe!

Cangyu Universe.

The Holy Land of the Sun.

The sun god will sit on the throne and listen to a deity below.

"The Rising Dragon God killed that guy?"

The sun god will be a little incredulous.

The Xulong Sanctuary is very close to the Dual Universe Black Hole node, and the Xulong Sanctuary has paid some costs, so it has the first chance to invade in a big way.

The previous competition was all small fights, but now it is the first large-scale invasion, and the target is the super clan Protoss of the Eternal Universe, once the Protoss is captured, the luck increase is not a little, it is definitely skyrocketing.

Originally, he was even a little jealous of the luck of the Xulong Divine General.

But now he is more happy, because his strength is slightly stronger than that of the Xulong God General, and he is still in the middle stage of the one-star God General, and he is still a little short of the late stage of the one-star God General.

"The eternal universe is not simple, and I am afraid that the previous situation was wrong. If the Eternal Universe only had one Star Early Divine General-level Yuan Gu Lord, then it would be impossible for the Xulong God to fall. "

The sun god will think.

If you don't find out clearly, if you invade again, there will be a god who will fall.

There are not many gods in the Cangyu universe, and many holy places only have one god general, once a god general falls, it even represents the fall of a holy land.

"It seems that the next step is to carefully investigate the situation of the Eternal Universe, originally planned to follow the invasion of the Xulong Holy Land, and my Sun Holy Land will also be invaded, and now this plan must be stopped!"

With this in mind, the Sun God will issue an order for all the Earth Lords who are preparing to invade the Eternal Universe to return to the Sun Holy Land.

At the same time, other holy places have also stopped their plans to invade the Eternal Universe.

The Eternal Universe and the Cangyu Universe also entered a brief period of peace.

But everyone knows that this peacetime will definitely not last long, and the battle will come.

The battle of detachment, the battle of luck, the battle of the two universes, if there is no dispute, there is no hope for the path of detachment in the future, it is equivalent to death.

As for pinning their hopes on successfully advancing to the Great Universe in the Dual Universe, they didn't have any expectations, because the probability was too low.

Their goal is only to transcend, to rise through the ranks before the collapse of the dual universe, and to escape from this universe.

Time flies, and a hundred years have passed.

Ye Tian fulfilled his promise, and then left the Protoss and returned to the Human Race.
